metadata.description: A collection of AI skills for software development

plugins.name: coding-python
plugins.description: Practical Python project setup + everyday development tasks. Supports existing repo toolchains (uv/poetry/pip) and can scaffold a new pyproject.toml-based project.

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Structured approach to brainstorming and design. Guides users through clarifying questions, proposing approaches, and writing design docs. Includes a visual companion for sketching ideas.
